title: Citizens Financial (CFG) Enhances Share Buyback Program to $1B
text: Given Citizens Financial's (CFG) robust capital base and strong liquidity position, its capital-deployment activities seem sustainable.

title: Citizens Launches Workforce Development Support for Queens
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Residents and businesses in Queens will benefit from broader and more equitable access to job training and development programs under a $350,000 Workforce Development programming commitment announced today by Citizens. The new initiative, launched in partnership with Pursuit, Rockaway Development & Revitalization Corporation, and Ocean Bay Community Development Corporation, will focus on much-needed technical skills training and career counseling in Queens. “Citiz

title: Citizens Financial Group, Inc. Announces Key Aspects of 2022 Capital Plan
text: PROVIDENCE, R.I.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Citizens Financial Group, Inc. (NYSE: CFG or the “Company”) today announces key aspects of its 2022 Capital Plan (the “Plan”), which includes increasing the Company's common share repurchase authorization to $1.0 billion. The Company's announcement follows publication on June 23, 2022 by the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System (the “Federal Reserve”) of the results from its DFAST stress tests and communication to Citizens of its preliminary Stress

title: Citizens (CFG) Offers Early Paycheck Access, To Scrap NSF Fees
text: Citizens Financial (CFG) rolls out Citizens Paid Early to provide early access to paychecks. The company will also remove NSF fees by 2022 end.

title: Citizens Financial Group Completes Acquisition of DH Capital
text: PROVIDENCE, R.I.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Citizens Financial Group, Inc. (NYSE: CFG or “Citizens”) today announced that it has completed its previously announced acquisition of DH Capital LLC, a private investment banking firm serving companies in the Internet infrastructure, software and next generation IT services, and communications sectors. Headquartered in New York City with an additional office in Boulder, Colo., DH Capital has completed more than 200 merger and acquisition transactions totaling
